prompt: Create a cinematic vertical 9:16 photorealistic fantasy sports scene inside a messy teenage bedroom at night: a life-size football player resembling Kylian Mbappé bursts out of a gigantic open comic book/poster standing upright against the back wall, as if tearing through the printed page into the real room. The player wears a France national team navy blue jersey with central red-white stripe, navy shorts, red socks, white boots, mid-stride with athletic running posture, dramatic motion blur, one foot forward, realistic fabric folds and stadium-style highlights. Behind him, the huge comic cover reads MBAPPÉ: L’HISTOIRE in bold white block letters, with explosive blue, red, and white speed lines, torn paper edges, flying scraps, and multiple comic panels showing football action poses. The bedroom is cluttered and immersive: exactly 12 visible room details should be included—1 black-and-red gaming chair on the left, 1 bed on the right, 1 blue rug on the floor, 1 looping warm LED rope light across the floor and bed edge, 2 game controllers on the rug, 1 pair of blue soccer boots in the foreground, 1 scattered pile of jerseys and laundry, 1 red clothing item near the chair, 1 cardboard box at lower right, 1 football near the poster, and 1 wall covered with football posters and graffiti-style writing. Add warm orange bedroom lighting mixed with cool electric blue energy streaks, high contrast, volumetric glow, dynamic paper fragments frozen in midair, wide-angle perspective from low eye level, ultra-detailed textures, realistic shadows, and a sense of magic realism. Faces may be softly obscured or motion-blurred, but the body language and football theme must remain clear. No logos other than generic football markings; keep the composition centered on the player emerging from the comic book.
